title: ERCOT Highest Price AS Offer Selected SCED CSV download
description:
The price and name of the QSE, DME, and resource submitting the offer for the highest-priced selected Ancillary Service (AS) Offer in ERCOT for each AS product in each interval of SCED in real time

Published with a 3 day delay.

Implemented on December 5th, 2025, as part of ERCOT's RTC+B project.
